# vike-rss-generator — Full Reference

A Vite plugin and Vike extension that generates RSS 2.0, Atom 1.0, and JSON Feed 1.1 files from Vike routes at build time. Works in SSR, SSG, and SPA environments.

## Architecture

The plugin runs as a Vite plugin with `apply: "build"`. Feed generation happens in the `closeBundle` hook of the SSR build pass, using `getVikeConfig()` from `vike/plugin` to access route data and per-page configs.

Pipeline: resolveConfig → collect → filter → metadata → serialize → validate → write

## Installation

```bash
bun add vike-rss-generator
```

Peer dependencies: vike >= 0.4.250, vite >= 7.0.0

## Setup

### Vite Plugin

```ts
// vite.config.ts
import { vikeRss } from "vike-rss-generator";

export default {
  plugins: [
    vikeRss({
      baseUrl: "https://example.com",
      groups: [
        {
          id: "blog",
          title: "My Blog",
          description: "Latest posts",
          format: "rss",
          language: "en",
          maxItems: 20,
        },
      ],
    }),
  ],
};
```

### Vike Extension

```ts
// pages/+config.ts
import vikeRssConfig from "vike-rss-generator/config";

export default {
  extends: [vikeRssConfig],
};
```

### Per-Page Config

```ts
// pages/blog/@slug/+rss.ts
import type { RssPageConfig } from "vike-rss-generator";

export const rss: RssPageConfig = {
  group: "blog",
  title: "My Post Title",
  description: "A summary",
  pubDate: new Date("2026-03-01"),
};
```

## Package Exports

- `vike-rss-generator` — main entry: `vikeRss` plugin factory, `normalizeDate`, `toRfc2822`, `toIso8601`, and all public types
- `vike-rss-generator/config` — Vike extension config (used in `extends` only)

## Plugin Options (RssPluginOptions)

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| baseUrl | string | required | Fully qualified base URL |
| groups | RssGroupConfig[] | required | Feed group definitions |
| defaultGroup | string | undefined | Default group ID for pages without explicit group |
| include | (string \| RegExp)[] | [] | URL patterns to include |
| exclude | (string \| RegExp)[] | [] | URL patterns to exclude |
| concurrency | number | 10 | Max concurrent async resolutions |
| dryRun | boolean | false | Log output without writing files |

## Group Config (RssGroupConfig)

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | required | Identifier for +rss.ts targeting |
| name | string | id | Output filename (without extension) |
| outDir | string | build root | Output directory relative to build output |
| format | FeedFormat \| FeedFormat[] | "rss" | Format(s): "rss", "atom", "json" |
| title | string | required | Channel title |
| description | string | required | Channel description |
| link | string | baseUrl | Channel link URL |
| language | string | — | Language code |
| copyright | string | — | Copyright notice |
| managingEditor | string | — | Editor email |
| webMaster | string | — | Webmaster email |
| ttl | number | — | Time-to-live in minutes |
| image | RssChannelImage | — | Channel image |
| category | string \| string[] | — | Channel categories |
| skipHours | number[] | — | Hours (0-23) to skip |
| skipDays | string[] | — | Days to skip |
| selfLink | boolean | true | Include atom:link rel="self" |
| maxItems | number | unlimited | Max items in feed |
| sortBy | "pubDate" \| "title" \| Function | "pubDate" | Sort field |
| sortOrder | "asc" \| "desc" | "desc" | Sort direction |
| prettyXml | boolean | false | Indent XML output |
| extension | string | format default | Custom file extension (e.g. ".rss"), overrides default |
| namespaces | Record<string, string> | {} | Custom XML namespace declarations |
| stylesheet | string | — | XSL stylesheet URL |
| hub | string | — | WebSub hub URL |

## Per-Page Item Config (RssItemConfig)

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| group | string | Target group ID (required unless defaultGroup set) |
| link | string | Override auto-derived item link URL |
| title | string | Item title (required) |
| description | string | Summary/excerpt |
| content | string | Full HTML content (CDATA wrapped) |
| pubDate | Date \| string \| number | Publication date |
| author | string | Author name or email |
| categories | string[] | Category tags |
| guid | string | Unique identifier (defaults to page URL) |
| enclosure | { url, length, type } | Media attachment |
| customFields | Record<string, string \| Record<string, string>> | Custom XML elements |

## Per-Page Config Types

- `RssPageConfig` — static: `RssItemConfig | RssItemConfig[]`
- `RssPageConfigFn` — async function: `(ctx: RssPageContext) => RssPageConfig | Promise<RssPageConfig>`
- `RssPageContext` — context: `{ url: string, routeParams: Record<string, string>, data: unknown }`

## Feed Formats

### RSS 2.0
- XML with `<channel>` and `<item>` elements
- Dates in RFC 2822 format
- HTML content in `<content:encoded>` with CDATA
- Supports custom XML namespaces

### Atom 1.0
- XML with `<feed>` and `<entry>` elements
- Dates in ISO 8601 format
- HTML content in `<content type="html">` with CDATA
- Native self-link and hub support

### JSON Feed 1.1
- JSON object with `items` array
- Dates in ISO 8601 format
- HTML content in `content_html` field
- Authors as array of objects

## File Naming

| Format | Single format | With RSS |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RSS | {name}.xml | {name}.xml |
| Atom | {name}.xml | {name}.atom.xml |
| JSON | {name}.json | {name}.json |

## Custom Fields

String values: `<dc:creator>Author Name</dc:creator>`
Object values: `<media:content url="..." medium="image"/>` (self-closing with attributes)

## CDATA Wrapping

HTML content in description and content fields is automatically wrapped in `<![CDATA[...]]>`. Falls back to XML entity escaping if content contains `]]>`.

## Validation

After serialization, the validator checks for missing required fields per spec. Warnings are logged via console.warn — the build never fails due to validation.

## Utility Exports

- `normalizeDate(value)` — converts Date, string, or number to Date
- `toRfc2822(date)` — formats as RFC 2822 (RSS 2.0)
- `toIso8601(date)` — formats as ISO 8601 (Atom, JSON Feed)

## Module Structure

```
src/
├── index.ts          # Public API re-exports
├── config.ts         # Vike extension
├── plugin.ts         # Vite plugin factory
├── resolveConfig.ts  # Config normalization
├── collector.ts      # Page collection from Vike
├── filter.ts         # Include/exclude filtering
├── metadata.ts       # Async metadata resolution
├── serializer.ts     # RSS/Atom/JSON serializers
├── writer.ts         # File output
├── validator.ts      # Feed validation
└── types.ts          # All type definitions
```
